summary: Iteration 44 - Bug fix verification: Owner (super_admin) can now modify restaurant settings. The fix changed role check from 'if role != ADMIN' to 'if role not in [ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN]' in both /api/settings/restaurant and /api/upload/restaurant-logo endpoints.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login as owner@maestroegp.com - returns super_admin role - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/settings/restaurant as owner (super_admin) - PASSED (200) - BUG FIX VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/upload/restaurant-logo as owner (super_admin) - PASSED (200) - BUG FIX VERIFIED
Backend: Request without token correctly returns 401/403 - PASSED
Frontend: Navigate to Settings > المطعم tab - PASSED
Frontend: Edit restaurant name (Arabic and English) - PASSED
Frontend: Save settings with success toast 'تم حفظ إعدادات المطعم بنجاح' - PASSED

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: المالك (owner@maestroegp.com) يحاول تعديل إعدادات المطعم ويظهر له 'غير مصرح'
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: APIs تتحقق من UserRole.ADMIN فقط بينما المالك لديه UserRole.SUPER_ADMIN
bug_fix_verification.fix_description: Changed role check from 'if role != ADMIN' to 'if role not in [ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN]'
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - All API calls return 200 for super_admin role

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly allows both ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN roles to modify restaurant settings
Both PUT /api/settings/restaurant and POST /api/upload/restaurant-logo endpoints are fixed
Authorization check is consistent across both endpoints

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 tests passed, 1 skipped due to missing admin user)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified the bug fix for owner (super_admin) authorization in restaurant settings. The fix in server.py (lines 5724 and 6819) correctly allows both ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN roles to modify restaurant settings. All backend APIs (/api/settings/restaurant GET/PUT, /api/upload/restaurant-logo POST) are working correctly for the owner. The owner (owner@maestroegp.com / owner123) can successfully edit restaurant name and upload logo without 'غير مصرح' error.
